smapsActiveEntity.msgText: 041239Z JUN 26 HYDROARC 96/26. 1. DUE TO SPACE WEATHER, HF COMMUNICATIONS AND GNSS POSITIONAL INFORMATION MAY BE DISRUPTED BY THE EFFECTS OF SOLAR FLARES. 2. DURING INCIDENTS AT SEA, MARINERS SHOULD CHECK THEIR POSITION USING ALL ALTERNATE MEANS AVAILABLE. 3. CANCEL THIS MSG 050001Z JUN 26.

031741Z JUN 26 HYDROARC 95/26. BARENTS SEA. RUSSIA. 1. HAZARDOUS OPERATIONS 0500Z TO 1900Z DAILY 08 THRU 11 JUN IN AREA BOUND BY 69-58.00N 033-38.00E, 69-58.00N 034-48.00E, 69-34.50N 034-48.00E, 69-34.50N 033-38.00E. 2. CANCEL THIS MSG 112000Z JUN 26.
031507Z JUN 26 HYDROARC 93/26. BARENTS SEA. RUSSIA. 1. ICEBERG REPORTED IN 77-25.60N 067-29.80E. 2. CANCEL THIS MSG 061507Z JUN 26.

291435Z MAY 26 HYDROARC 90/26. 1. HYDROARC WARNINGS IN FORCE AS OF 291435Z MAY. ALL THE INFORCE WARNINGS ARE LISTED HERE. 89/2026, 86/2026, 85/2026, 69/2026, 61/2026, 55/2026. 180/2025, 178/2025, 175/2025, 148/2025, 145/2025, 103/2025. 283/2024. 163/2023. 198/2022. 2. THE COMPLETE TEXT OF ALL IN-FORCE HYDROARC BROADCAST WARNINGS ARE AVAILABLE ON THE NGA MARITIME SAFETY INFORMATION WEBSITE AT: msi.nga.mil/NavWarnings. ALTERNATIVELY, THESE MAY BE REQUESTED BY E-MAIL FROM NGA AT NAVSAFETY@NGA.MIL. 3. CANCEL HYDROARC 77/26.

011823Z MAY 26 HYDROARC 55/26. MARITIME CONTENT DISSEMINATION PORTAL (MCDP) ADVISORY NGA IS AWARE OF AN ISSUE RESULTING IN A LOGIN LOOP FOR SOME USERS ATTEMPTING TO ACCESS NGA???S MARITIME CONTENT DISSEMINATION PORTAL (HTTPS://MARITIME.GEO.NGA.MIL). NGA IS INVESTIGATING FURTHER. AT THIS TIME, IMPACTED USERS SHOULD ENSURE THEIR EMAIL ADDRESS HAS BEEN ADDED TO THEIR GEOAXIS PROFILE AT HTTPS://PORTAL.GEOAXIS.GS.MIL/USER. USERS ARE ALSO ADVISED TO CLEAR THEIR WEB BROWSER CACHE AND TRY ANOTHER WEB BROWSER. ESYNC (HTTPS://ESYNC.NGA.MIL) REMAINS FULLY AVAILABLE AND CAN BE USED TO UPDATE CHARTS AND ENC REGIONS PREVIOUSLY RECEIVED FROM NGA. IF YOU REQUIRE FURTHER ASSISTANCE, INCLUDING REQUESTS FOR DIRECT DOWNLOADS VIA DOD SAFE, PLEASE CONTACT MARHELP@NGA.MIL.
030023Z OCT 25 HYDROARC 180/25(15). BEAUFORT SEA. CANADA. DNC 27. RACON AT TUKTOYAKTUK ISLAND LIGHT 69-27.35N 132-59.97W INOPERATIVE.

011116Z OCT 25 HYDROARC 178/25(15). FRANKLIN STRAIT. MCCLINTOCK CHANNEL. CANADA. DNC 28. DEPTHS REPORTED: A. 29.3 METERS IN 71-22.82N 096-41.27W. B. 26.6 METERS IN 71-22.05N 096-40.73W. C. 11.3 METERS IN 71-21.53N 096-45.79W. D. 11.3 METERS IN 71-21.20N 096-44.65W. E. 28.4 METERS IN 71-20.59N 096-45.34W. F. 28.35 METERS IN 71-18.28N 096-49.03W.
292329Z SEP 25 HYDROARC 175/25(15). MCCLINTOCK CHANNEL. CANADA. DNC 28. 33.6 METER DEPTH REPORTED IN 76-40.36N 102-16.62W.
310015Z AUG 25 HYDROARC 148/25(15). LANCASTER SOUND. CANADA. DNC 28. 13.6 METER DEPTH REPORTED IN 74-38.63N 091-20.54W.
290041Z AUG 25 HYDROARC 145/25(15). BEAUFORT SEA. CANADA. DNC 27. RACON AT PITT ISLAND 69-09.00N 136-11.00W INOPERATIVE.

171751Z JUL 25 HYDROARC 103/25. CANCELLED ELECTRONIC NAVIGATIONAL CHART (ENC) ADVISORY. USERS OF NGA ENC PRODUCTS ARE ADVISED OF POTENTIAL UNINTENDED ECDIS BEHAVIOR WHEN PROCESSING CANCELLED CHARTS, INCLUDING REINSTALLATION OF RECENTLY CANCELLED CHARTS ON SOME SYSTEMS WITHOUT OBVIOUS ERROR OR WARNING MESSAGES. NGA HAS CONFIRMED THIS ISSUE AFFECTS NAVY VMS 9.5 AND RAYTHEON ANSCHUTZ SYNAPSIS NX SYSTEMS. THIS ISSUE DOES NOT AFFECT NAVY ECDIS. OTHER SYSTEMS ARE CURRENTLY UNASSESSED. USERS MAY REFERENCE NGAS ENC CATALOG (GLOBAL OR REGIONAL PRODUCT LISTINGS) FOR A LIST OF CANCELLED CHARTS WHICH SHOULD BE UNINSTALLED FROM ECDIS. NGAS GLOBAL ENC CATALOG IS AVAILABLE ON HTTPS://MCDP.NGA.MIL, WITH REGIONAL ENC PRODUCT LISTING SPREADSHEETS CONTAINED WITHIN EACH REGIONS ZIP ON ESYNC, NGAS WEBSITES, AND WORLDCOVER DVD. USERS MAY FILTER PRODUCT LISTINGS FOR EDITION OF CXL AND SORT BY ISSUE DATE TO SEE MOST RECENT CANCELLATIONS. CHARTS CANCELLED WITHIN THE LAST 90 DAYS ARE ACTIVELY DISSEMINATED BY NGA AND MOST LIKELY CANDIDATES FOR INADVERTENT REINSTALLATION. NGA IS CONSULTING WITH THE USER COMMUNITY TO ASSESS POSSIBLE CHANGES TO THE CANCELLED CHART DISSEMINATION PROCESS TO MITIGATE THIS POTENTIAL UNINTENDED ECDIS BEHAVIOR.

170858Z DEC 24 HYDROARC 283/24(16). BEAUFORT SEA. CHUKCHI SEA. ALASKA. DNC 27. SCIENTIFIC MOORINGS ESTABLISHED: A. BCE-24, IN 71-40.40N 154-59.90W, AT DEPTH 108 METERS, TOP FLOAT 20 METERS. B. BCC-24, IN 71-44.10N 155-09.68W, AT DEPTH 291 METERS, TOP FLOAT 21 METERS. C. BCW-24, IN 71-47.80N 155-20.83W, AT DEPTH 165 METERS, TOP FLOAT 40 METERS. D. NAP-24T, IN 74-31.37N 161-56.19W, AT DEPTH 1680 METERS, TOP FLOAT 28 METERS.
150429Z AUG 23 HYDROARC 163/23(15). BEAUFORT SEA. CANADA. DNC 27. RACON AT PULLEN ISLAND LIGHT 69-46.60N 134-24.40W INOPERATIVE.
111643Z AUG 22 HYDROARC 198/22(15). BEAUFORT SEA. CANADA. DNC 27. RACON AT SHINGLE POINT BEACON 69-00.00N 137-34.50W INOPERATIVE.
